## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (performance optimization, visual cleanup, type corrections)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification & Testing
Describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.
- [ ] Verify `npm run lint` compiles with 0 errors
- [ ] Verify `npm run build` generates build folders successfully
- [ ] Verify Docker Compose starts and runs backend + frontend services without crash loops

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or TypeScript errors
- [ ] No debug statements (e.g. `console.log`) are left in client files
